sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88848" key="pro/sdecis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσδεξις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n88848.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">acceptance</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φαντασιῶν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zeno Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.20</biblScope></bibl></cit>, Herill. ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
